articles.author: Slamani Aghilas
articles.title: Ancient Fossil Reveals a Surprising Truth About Dinosaur Size - Indian Defence Review
articles.description: A 90-million-year-old fossil from Argentina is challenging what scientists believed about tiny dinosaurs.
articles.content: The fossil was discovered in 2014 at the La Buitrera fossil area, and researchers spent about a decade preparing the fragile bones for study. According to the University of Minnesotas release, the wo… [+3952 chars]
